name: The Land of Nonexistence
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of exploration, add one "Defense" of the wielder to the deck, increasing the Shield of the wielder's "Defense" by [StateArg1]%.
lore:
Tawil sleeps at the bottom of the Black Pool.

There, it is eternally silent and dark, filled only with a despairing blackness.

No guests have ever visited here, and no sounds have ever reached here.

This is a place where Destruction cannot reach—

Because disaster have already arrived.

As the master of time and sequences, she has witnessed far too many painful ends.

As a part of the rules, she is powerless to stop the night from falling.

In this case, she can only lie dormant in the realm of non-existence, awaiting the arrival of the one who can be called a "variable."

That person will undoubtedly come.
